name: PER_SENIORITY_HOURS
description: This is transactional table for storing seniority hours from Payroll or OTL.

columns.Name: FROM_DATE
columns.Comments: Date from which this record is valid

columns.Name: TO_DATE
columns.Comments: Date to which this record is valid

columns.Name: HOURS
columns.Comments: Number of hours recorded from external data source

columns.Name: BASE_HOURS
columns.Comments: First loaded value of Hours retained on change of hours

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Data source if this record. For example HDL

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the parent Assignment record

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the parent Person record

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Business group refernce of the parent enterpirse

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VESION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Mandatory column to track changes of the physical record

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the parent Period Of Service record

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
